---
title: "merge_traces.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/merge_traces.py"
loc: 92
complexity: 16
logic_score: 1.30
style_score: 3.56
intel_score: 6.62
overall_score: 3.76
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TraceMerger, _load_dataset.

## Interaction Protocol
Import TraceMerger and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 34 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `TraceMerger`
- `_load_dataset`
- `_save_dataset`
- `_process_single_trace`
- `_process_trace_file`
- `execute`
